# Recovery Point Template

This directory represents the approved directory structure for a RevChatham Homelab Recovery Point.

The template serves as a visual and operational reference for creating new Recovery Points.

---

## Purpose

This template demonstrates the expected directory structure, documentation, and supporting files that should exist within every Recovery Point.

It is intended to provide technicians with a known-good example before creating or validating a Recovery Point.

---

## Naming Convention

Recovery Points use the following format:

```text
RP-YYYYMMDD-###
```

Examples:

```text
RP-20260711-001
RP-20260718-001
RP-20260805-002
```

The identifier:

```text
RP-YYYYMMDD-000
```

is permanently reserved for the Recovery Point Template and shall never be used as an operational Recovery Point.

---

## Independent Standard Evolution (ISE)

The Recovery Point Standard evolves through the Independent Standard Evolution (ISE) process.

Changes are introduced only after practical validation during real implementation.

This template always reflects the currently approved Recovery Point Standard.

---
